3640002146.title: Record Cleaner Kit with 65ml Spray, Anti-Static Velvet Brush & Stylus Cleaning Tools for Safe Vinyl Turntable Use By SIKEZHAN
3640002146.detail_text: p{margin-block-start: 0; margin-block-end: 0} Revive Your Vinyl. Hear the Music, Not the Noise Professional 4-in-1 Record Cleaning Kit with 65ml Cleaning Solution. Icons/Badges ✅ Anti-Static ✅ Deep Cleaning ✅ Safe for LPs Why Choose SIKEZHAN? Headline: The Ultimate Care for Your Collection �� Crystal Clear Sound Effectively removes dust, stains, and fingerprints that cause pops and crackles. Restore the original high-fidelity sound of your records. ��️ Scratch-Free Protection Our soft velvet brush reaches deep into the grooves without harming the delicate surface. Safe for all your precious albums. �� Advanced 65ml Formula Includes a large 65ml spray bottle of cleaning fluid. Specifically formulated to dissolve grime and eliminate static charges instantly. Product Breakdown Headline: What's Inside the Kit? 1.Velvet Brush Handle: Ergonomic design for a comfortable grip and precise control. 2.65ml Cleaning Spray: High-capacity fluid for long-term maintenance. 3.Stylus Brush: Safely cleans the needle tip to improve tracking and extend stylus life. 4.Small Nylon Brush: Used to clean dust off the velvet pad after use. How to Use Headline: Easy 3-Step Cleaning Process Step 1: Prep Spray the cleaning solution 2-3 times onto the velvet brush surface. (Note: Do not spray directly on the record). Step 2: Wipe Place the record on the turntable and start it. Gently hold the brush on the grooves and let the record spin for 2-3 rotations. Wipe from the center outward. Step 3: Stylus Care Use the small black brush to gently clean the stylus from back to front. Specifications Headline: Specifications Brand: SIKEZHAN Fluid Volume: 65ml (approx.) Material: ABS Plastic + Microfiber Velvet Suitable For: Vinyl Records, LP, Turntable Players, VCD/DVD Screens. Package Includes: (Depends on the variant you choose) Full Set Option: 1x Brush Kit + 1x 65ml Fluid
3640002146.detail_html:
p{margin-block-start: 0; margin-block-end: 0}

Revive Your Vinyl. Hear the Music, Not the Noise

Professional 4-in-1 Record Cleaning Kit with 65ml Cleaning Solution.

Icons/Badges

✅ Anti-Static
✅ Deep Cleaning
✅ Safe for LPs

Why Choose SIKEZHAN?

Headline: The Ultimate Care for Your Collection

�� Crystal Clear Sound Effectively removes dust, stains, and fingerprints that cause pops and crackles. Restore the original high-fidelity sound of your records.

��️ Scratch-Free Protection Our soft velvet brush reaches deep into the grooves without harming the delicate surface. Safe for all your precious albums.

�� Advanced 65ml Formula Includes a large 65ml spray bottle of cleaning fluid. Specifically formulated to dissolve grime and eliminate static charges instantly.

Product Breakdown

Headline: What's Inside the Kit?

1.Velvet Brush Handle: Ergonomic design for a comfortable grip and precise control.
2.65ml Cleaning Spray: High-capacity fluid for long-term maintenance.
3.Stylus Brush: Safely cleans the needle tip to improve tracking and extend stylus life.
4.Small Nylon Brush: Used to clean dust off the velvet pad after use.

How to Use

Headline: Easy 3-Step Cleaning Process
Step 1: Prep Spray the cleaning solution 2-3 times onto the velvet brush surface. (Note: Do not spray directly on the record).

Step 2: Wipe Place the record on the turntable and start it. Gently hold the brush on the grooves and let the record spin for 2-3 rotations. Wipe from the center outward.

Step 3: Stylus Care Use the small black brush to gently clean the stylus from back to front.

Specifications

Headline: Specifications

Brand: SIKEZHAN

Fluid Volume: 65ml (approx.)

Material: ABS Plastic + Microfiber Velvet

Suitable For: Vinyl Records, LP, Turntable Players, VCD/DVD Screens.

Package Includes: (Depends on the variant you choose)

Full Set Option: 1x Brush Kit + 1x 65ml Fluid

3565353801.detail_text: Durable Material Made from durable materials, this brush is built to last, providing long-term value for your cleaning needs. Versatile Use This versatile brush is perfect for cleaning bathtubs, floors, and walls, making it an essential tool for any household. No Dead Angles With its unique design, this brush ensures no dead angles, leaving your bathroom clean and free of dirt. Sturdy Bristles Equipped with sturdy bristles, this brush effectively cleans dirt and grime from floors and walls, ensuring a spotless bathroom. Easy to Use Its ergonomic design makes it easy to use, even for those with limited mobility, ensuring a thorough clean every time.

The ergonomic grip ensures comfortable use, reducing fatigue during cleaning tasks.

Its long handle design enables easy reach to clean hard-to-access areas with ease.

2801706510.detail_text: Specification: Brand new Material: iron Color: as picture shows Size: approx. 13.8*4.4cm/ 5.43*1.73" Easy and comfortable to use for effective cleaning Handle slides over blade for safety when not in use This scraper is ideally suited for removing firmly seated food residuals from the ceramic-glass surface Perfect for cleaning the cooking surface during and after cooking process Removes all types of burnt on residues on all glass & ceramic hobs Ideal for many uses, including scrape paint, glass tiles, windows, remove decals, labels, adhesives, solid stains, doors etc Package included: 1 x scraper cleaner(other accessories are not included) Note: Please allow 0.5-1cm errors due to manual measurement Item color displayed in photos may be showing slightly different on your computer monitor since monitors are not calibrated same
2801706510.detail_html:
Specification:

  • Brand new

  • Material: iron

  • Color: as picture shows

  • Size: approx. 13.8*4.4cm/ 5.43*1.73"

  • Easy and comfortable to use for effective cleaning

  • Handle slides over blade for safety when not in use

  • This scraper is ideally suited for removing firmly seated food residuals from the ceramic-glass surface

  • Perfect for cleaning the cooking surface during and after cooking process

  • Removes all types of burnt on residues on all glass & ceramic hobs

  • Ideal for many uses, including scrape paint, glass tiles, windows, remove decals, labels, adhesives, solid stains, doors etc

Package included:

  • 1 x scraper cleaner(other accessories are not included)

Note:

  • Please allow 0.5-1cm errors due to manual measurement

  • Item color displayed in photos may be showing slightly different on your computer monitor since monitors are not calibrated same

3439383735.title: HOTO Multi-Brush Electric Spin Scrubber - Dual Speed, Multi Brushes, Extendable, IPX7, 4000mAh Batt
3439383735.detail_text: Summary Introduction: Enhance your cleaning routine with the versatile and efficient cleaning tool featured in the images. Designed to tackle a variety of cleaning tasks with precision and ease, this device offers multiple brush heads each suited for specific cleaning challenges, from kitchen grease to bathroom grime. Its ergonomic design, coupled with advanced features like dual-speed options and long-lasting battery life, makes it an indispensable tool for maintaining cleanliness in every corner of your home. Features: 2.5 N·m Powerful Torque and 300 RPM. Dual-Speed Functionality: Easily switch between 220 RPM and 300 RPM to tackle different cleaning tasks. Extended Reach and Versatility: Features an extendable handle and 6 interchangeable brush heads for versatile applications. Ergonomic Comfort: A 45° angle design ensures comfort and reduces strain during use. IPX7 Waterproof Rating. Specification: Net Weight: ~1.76 lbs (Main Unit + Extension Rod) Dimensions: ~4.1" × 4.3" × 51.2"(Main Body + Extension Rod) Waterproof Rating: IPX7 Run Time: Up to 110mins Maximum Torque: 2.5N·m First Gear No-load Speed: 220±10% r/min Second Gear No-load Speed: 300±10% r/min Charging Time: ~180 Minutes Battery Capacity: 4000mAh / 14.4Wh Battery Type: Lithium-Ion
3439383735.detail_html:
Summary Introduction:



Enhance your cleaning routine with the versatile and efficient cleaning tool featured in the images. Designed to tackle a variety of cleaning tasks with precision and ease, this device offers multiple brush heads each suited for specific cleaning challenges, from kitchen grease to bathroom grime. Its ergonomic design, coupled with advanced features like dual-speed options and long-lasting battery life, makes it an indispensable tool for maintaining cleanliness in every corner of your home.



Features:

  • 2.5 N·m Powerful Torque and 300 RPM.
  • Dual-Speed Functionality: Easily switch between 220 RPM and 300 RPM to tackle different cleaning tasks.
  • Extended Reach and Versatility: Features an extendable handle and 6 interchangeable brush heads for versatile applications.
  • Ergonomic Comfort: A 45° angle design ensures comfort and reduces strain during use.
  • IPX7 Waterproof Rating.

Specification:

  • Net Weight: ~1.76 lbs (Main Unit + Extension Rod)
  • Dimensions: ~4.1" × 4.3" × 51.2"(Main Body + Extension Rod)
  • Waterproof Rating: IPX7
  • Run Time: Up to 110mins
  • Maximum Torque: 2.5N·m
  • First Gear No-load Speed: 220±10% r/min
  • Second Gear No-load Speed: 300±10% r/min
  • Charging Time: ~180 Minutes
  • Battery Capacity: 4000mAh / 14.4Wh
  • Battery Type: Lithium-Ion

product.desc:
Summary Introduction:



Enhance your cleaning routine with the versatile and efficient cleaning tool featured in the images. Designed to tackle a variety of cleaning tasks with precision and ease, this device offers multiple brush heads each suited for specific cleaning challenges, from kitchen grease to bathroom grime. Its ergonomic design, coupled with advanced features like dual-speed options and long-lasting battery life, makes it an indispensable tool for maintaining cleanliness in every corner of your home.



Features:

  • 2.5 N·m Powerful Torque and 300 RPM.
  • Dual-Speed Functionality: Easily switch between 220 RPM and 300 RPM to tackle different cleaning tasks.
  • Extended Reach and Versatility: Features an extendable handle and 6 interchangeable brush heads for versatile applications.
  • Ergonomic Comfort: A 45° angle design ensures comfort and reduces strain during use.
  • IPX7 Waterproof Rating.

Specification:

  • Net Weight: ~1.76 lbs (Main Unit + Extension Rod)
  • Dimensions: ~4.1" × 4.3" × 51.2"(Main Body + Extension Rod)
  • Waterproof Rating: IPX7
  • Run Time: Up to 110mins
  • Maximum Torque: 2.5N·m
  • First Gear No-load Speed: 220±10% r/min
  • Second Gear No-load Speed: 300±10% r/min
  • Charging Time: ~180 Minutes
  • Battery Capacity: 4000mAh / 14.4Wh
  • Battery Type: Lithium-Ion
product.highlights:
• Multiple Brush Heads: The tool comes with a variety of brush heads including a Flat Brush, Small Flat Brush, Pointed Brush, Sponge Pad, Scour Pad, and Cloth Pad, each designed for specific tasks. This versatility allows for effective cleaning on different surfaces and hard-to-reach areas.
  • Dual-Speed Functionality: Offers two speed settings—220 rpm for gentle cleaning and 300 rpm for more intense tasks, allowing you to adjust the scrubbing power as needed.
  • Extended Reach: Features an adjustable extension pole that extends from 77.8cm to 113cm, enabling you to easily clean high and low areas.
  • Long Battery Life: Equipped with a 4000mAh lithium battery, it provides up to 90 minutes of cleaning time, ensuring you can complete your cleaning tasks on a single charge.
  • Ergonomic Design: The brush handle is set at a 45° angle, promoting comfort and reducing strain during use. This design facilitates easy one-handed operation.
  • IPX7 Waterproof Rating: Makes it safe to use in wet conditions such as cleaning sinks or bathtubs.
  • Silicone Strap and Type-C Charging: A convenient silicone strap for easy storage and carrying, and a modern Type-C charging port for fast recharging.

page_json.description: HOTO. Multiple Brush Heads: The tool comes with a variety of brush heads including a Flat Brush, Small Flat Brush, Pointed Brush, Sponge Pad, Scour Pad, and Cloth Pad, each designed for specific tasks. This versatility allows for effective cleaning on different surfaces and hard-to-reach areas. Dual-Speed Functionality: Offers two speed settings 220 rpm for gentle cleaning and 300 rpm for more intense tasks, allowing you to adjust the scrubbing power as needed. Extended Reach: Features an adjustable extension pole that extends from 77.8cm to 113cm, enabling you to easily clean high and low areas. Long Battery Life: Equipped with a 4000mAh lithium battery, it provides up to 90 minutes of cleaning time, ensuring you can complete your cleaning tasks on a single charge. Ergonomic Design: The brush handle is set at a 45° angle, promoting comfort and reducing strain during use. This design facilitates easy one-handed operation. 3570903921.detail_html:
Flexi-Clean Anywhere — Rotates to Reach, Built to Power Through.

Tired of back-breaking scrubbing and reaching for those impossible corners? The HOTO Flexi™ Cordless Spin Scrubber is the ultimate upgrade for your cleaning routine. Designed with the motto "Flexi Your Way, Stress-Free Day!", this powerful, ergonomic tool transforms difficult deep cleaning tasks into quick, effortless chores.

Key Features:

● 5 Angle Settings: Flexible adjustments for whole-home, effortless reach.

● 4X Cleaning Power with DuraSpin: 4N.m torque performance for stronger and deeper stains removal.

● 8 Replaceable Brush Head: Multiple options included to cover every cleaning need.

● Extension Rod with Auxiliary Controls: Reach high or low for precise, effortless cleaning.

● IPX7 Waterproof Main Unit: Safe for full wash-down and wet environments.

● Smart Display & Long Runtime: Stay in control with real-time data shown clearly on screen. Enjoy up to 110 minutes of cleaning.

Specification:

Dimensions: Approx. 53.87"×2.53"×2.36" (1368×64×60mm)

Net Weight: 2.20 lb (Est. 1kg)

Input Parameter: 5V 2A

Nominal Voltage: 3.6V

Battery Type: Lithium-Ion

Charging Time: Approx.170 Minutes

Battery Capacity: 4000mAh / 14.4Wh

Run Time: Up to 110mins

Typical Low Gear No-Load Speed: 170 ±10% r/min

Typical High Gear No-Load Speed: 245 ±10% r/min

What's In The Box:

1 x HOTO Flexi™ Spin Scrubber

1 x Removable Extension Rode

1 x Large Flat Brush

1 x Ball Brush

1 x Pointed Brush

2 x Sponge Pad

1 x Scour Pad

1 x Cloth Pad

1 x Synthetic Wool Pad

1 x Velcro Adapter for Pads

1 x Brush Head Bag

1 x Charging Cable

1 Year Manufacturing Defect Warranty

* Only applies to the main motor and does not include spare parts.

aiTexts: This microfiber feather duster features superfine fibers and durable PP material for gentle yet effective dusting.
Its adjustable stretch design allows easy access to high and hard-to-reach areas, ensuring thorough cleaning.
The irregular-shaped duster head targets corners and crevices for precise dust removal.
With a 34cm long handle, it provides safe, comfortable reach for windows, furniture, or car interiors.
Ideal for versatile use around the home, including bookshelves and living rooms.

The areas where the US warehouse does not deliver goods are: Hawaii, Alaska, Puerto Rico, Guam and other US overseas territories. And the military address. But you can choose ship from China.

Spanish buyers attention:
If your address includes following postal code please do not choose the Spanish warehouse.
The zip code starts with 35/38.
Overseas warehouse cannot be delivered. But you can choose ship from China



Adjustable Stretch Extend Microfiber Duster Dusting Brush Household Cleaning Tool

Features:

Stainless steel integrated extension rod design, the height can be extended to 82cm/32.28".

Can clean the high place.

The duster head uses the dense fiber, the electrostatic dust can be flexed freely, can clean many places, and the clean life is easily realized.
Superfine fiber hair brush head, strong adsorption capacity, dust will not fly everywhere.

Can be bent, clean without dead angle, all-directional removal of stubborn stains.

Specifications:

Material: superfine fiber, PP material
Length: 34cm/13.39", can be extended to 82cm/32.28"
Weight: 60g


Notes:
1. Due to the different monitor and light effect, the actual color of the item might be slightly different from the color showed on the pictures. Thank you!
2. Please allow 1-3cm measuring deviation due to manual measurement.

3505227600.title: HOTO Wand Cordless Spin Scrubber - 360° Rotary Power, 210 Min Runtime, IPX7, 12 Brush Head
3505227600.detail_text: Summary: The HOTO Wand™ Cordless Spin Scrubber is a powerful and quiet cleaning tool designed for efficiency. It features a 360° rotary motor with two speed settings for tackling both delicate surfaces and tough stains. The device is IPX7 waterproof, allowing for easy cleaning, and its rechargeable battery provides up to 210 minutes of runtime. It comes with 12 magnetic brush heads for various cleaning tasks, making it a versatile solution for household chores. Details & Features: 360° Rotary Power: Upgrade to a 360 ° rotating electric rotary motor, 5x the efficiency, and 40% less splash. Clean smarter, not harder! Dual-Speed with High Torque: Cleaning isn’t just about speed—torque matters. HOTO delivers powerful, high-torque rotation, with two intelligent speed modes: 170 RPM for delicate surfaces, and 250 RPM for tough stains and grout lines. Long-Lasting Rechargeable Battery: Runs up to 210 minutes on a single charge. 12 Magnetic Brush Heads Included: Comes with 12 durable magnetic brush heads engineered for tough stains and tight corners—enhanced elasticity and wear resistance for extended use. Whisper-Quiet Operation: Operates at just 59dB—25% quieter than standard electric scrubbers. Enjoy powerful cleaning without the noise. Specifications: Product Name: HOTO Wand Cordless Spin Scrubber Battery Capacity: 2000mAh Dimensions: 10.00" x 1.42" x 1.38" Weight: Approximately 0.39 lbs (about 177 grams) Included in the box: 1x HOTO Wand 4x specific brushes (S, M, L, and Pointed) 4x scouring pads 4x cloth pads 1x brush head bag 1x charging cable
3505227600.detail_html:
Summary:

The HOTO Wand™ Cordless Spin Scrubber is a powerful and quiet cleaning tool designed for efficiency. It features a 360° rotary motor with two speed settings for tackling both delicate surfaces and tough stains. The device is IPX7 waterproof, allowing for easy cleaning, and its rechargeable battery provides up to 210 minutes of runtime. It comes with 12 magnetic brush heads for various cleaning tasks, making it a versatile solution for household chores.

Details & Features:

  • 360° Rotary Power: Upgrade to a 360 ° rotating electric rotary motor, 5x the efficiency, and 40% less splash. Clean smarter, not harder!
  • Dual-Speed with High Torque: Cleaning isn’t just about speed—torque matters. HOTO delivers powerful, high-torque rotation, with two intelligent speed modes: 170 RPM for delicate surfaces, and 250 RPM for tough stains and grout lines.
  • Long-Lasting Rechargeable Battery: Runs up to 210 minutes on a single charge.
  • 12 Magnetic Brush Heads Included: Comes with 12 durable magnetic brush heads engineered for tough stains and tight corners—enhanced elasticity and wear resistance for extended use.
  • Whisper-Quiet Operation: Operates at just 59dB—25% quieter than standard electric scrubbers. Enjoy powerful cleaning without the noise.

Specifications:

Product Name: HOTO Wand Cordless Spin Scrubber

Battery Capacity: 2000mAh

Dimensions: 10.00" x 1.42" x 1.38"

Weight: Approximately 0.39 lbs (about 177 grams)

Included in the box:

1x HOTO Wand

4x specific brushes (S, M, L, and Pointed)

4x scouring pads

4x cloth pads

1x brush head bag

1x charging cable

The overall length is approximately 40 cm (15.75 inches), with a maximum width of about 8 cm (3.15 inches), offering an extended reach for various retrieving tasks. 2. Comfortable Grip Handle: Featuring an ergonomically designed ABS plastic handle, this picking tool offers a comfortable and secure grip. This thoughtful design helps reduce hand fatigue, ensuring ease of use during prolonged operations. 3. Anti-Slip Gripper Head: The anti-slip gripper head allows for effortless and secure retrieval of items. It is engineered to firmly grasp objects, preventing them from accidentally dropping and making your picking tasks more efficient. 4. Reinforced Stainless Steel Shaft: Constructed with a thickened stainless steel shaft, this grabber tool provides enhanced strength and stable performance. This robust design detail supports its ability to handle various items with reliability. 5. Versatile Picking Tool: An ideal solution for a multitude of needs, this grabber is perfect for collecting litter, reaching objects in high or tight spaces, or assisting individuals with mobility challenges. Its adaptability makes it a valuable aid for everyday tasks. 13732527286.detail_html:
Description

1. Premium Materials & Dimensions: This grabber tool is expertly crafted from a combination of high-quality plastic (ABS and TPR) and stainless steel, providing a well-balanced and functional design. The overall length is approximately 40 cm (15.75 inches), with a maximum width of about 8 cm (3.15 inches), offering an extended reach for various retrieving tasks.

2. Comfortable Grip Handle: Featuring an ergonomically designed ABS plastic handle, this picking tool offers a comfortable and secure grip. This thoughtful design helps reduce hand fatigue, ensuring ease of use during prolonged operations.

3. Anti-Slip Gripper Head: The anti-slip gripper head allows for effortless and secure retrieval of items. It is engineered to firmly grasp objects, preventing them from accidentally dropping and making your picking tasks more efficient.

4. Reinforced Stainless Steel Shaft: Constructed with a thickened stainless steel shaft, this grabber tool provides enhanced strength and stable performance. This robust design detail supports its ability to handle various items with reliability.

5. Versatile Picking Tool: An ideal solution for a multitude of needs, this grabber is perfect for collecting litter, reaching objects in high or tight spaces, or assisting individuals with mobility challenges. Its adaptability makes it a valuable aid for everyday tasks.

2824691358.detail_text: Size: 25x3cm/9.84x1.18inch Quantity: 1pc Color: Natural Package Included: 1pcs x Wok Brush Material: Bamboo Both dry and wet, non-stick oil and decontamination are strong and do not hurt your hands, easily sweep away the dust and garbage on the stove top, and clean the bacteria that grow on the sticky board. Bamboo pot brush, green and healthy, strong detergency, not easy to damage the surface of the appliance. Lengthened solid wood handle, comfortable grip, not easy to break. The metal ring is reinforced, and the handle and brush head are reinforced and the connection is firm and durable and not easy to loosen. The design has a lanyard to hang up. It is easy to scrub stains on various surfaces and is very suitable for cast steel pots, pans and plates.

3364351323.title: HOTO Electric Spin Scrubber
3364351323.detail_text: Specifications BrandHOTOSKU3364351323_SGAMZ-22484425201Usage AreaBathroomMaterialPlasticType Of Cleaning Toolscleaning brushModelHOTO Electric Spin Scrubber What’s in the box No Data Highlights The HOTO Electric Spin Scrubber is designed for efficient and effortless cleaning of kitchens and bathrooms. Featuring IPX7 waterproof protection and six interchangeable brush heads, it tackles various surfaces from tiles to glass with ease. Its ergonomic 45° handle and lightweight build enable comfortable single-hand use. Powered by a strong motor delivering 2.5N·m torque and a 4000mAh battery, it offers up to 90 minutes of cordless operation. Dual-speed settings allow adjustment for different cleaning needs, making it ideal for home users seeking effective multi-surface cleaning. 3116814605.title: Disposable TPR Toilet Brush Quick Drain Cleaning Brush Tools for Toilet Household WC Bathroom Accessories Sets
3116814605.detail_text: Features： ◎Bring your own cleaning fluid, which can be discarded immediately after use. ◎The cleaning solution will melt immediately when it meets with water, and quickly release the decontamination factor. ◎Quick cleaning without damaging the toilet. ◎Easy to clean to places that are not usually cleaned. ◎Automatically lock, one slice at a time, more hygienic. Various cleaning: ◎Cleaning the seat barrel (new brush head for health) ◎Cleaning the bottom of the toilet (sponge fits the base) ◎Cleaning the back of the toilet (the sponge goes deep into the corner gap) ◎Cleaning floor drain stains (big brush head cleans quickly)

product.desc:
Features：

◎Bring your own cleaning fluid, which can be discarded immediately after use. ◎The cleaning solution will melt immediately when it meets with water, and quickly release the decontamination factor. ◎Quick cleaning without damaging the toilet. ◎Easy to clean to places that are not usually cleaned. ◎Automatically lock, one slice at a time, more hygienic.

Various cleaning: ◎Cleaning the seat barrel (new brush head for health) ◎Cleaning the bottom of the toilet (sponge fits the base) ◎Cleaning the back of the toilet (the sponge goes deep into the corner gap) ◎Cleaning floor drain stains (big brush head cleans quickly)

Multi-functional Use Ideal for removing dust and cobwebs from various surfaces, making it a versatile cleaning tool for your home. Durable Material Made from durable materials, this dusting brush is built to last, providing long-term value. Easy to Clean After use, the tool is easy to clean, ensuring maintenance is hassle-free. Efficient Dust Collection The efficient dust collection feature ensures that all dust and debris are gathered, leaving your home cleaner.

Lightweight and Portable

Its lightweight and portable design makes it easy to handle and maneuver around your home.

Multi-functional Use

Ideal for removing dust and cobwebs from various surfaces, making it a versatile cleaning tool for your home.

Durable Material

Easy to Clean

Efficient Dust Collection

aiTexts: The gumahus Dust Removal Extendable Ceiling Cleaning Tool features a microfiber duster head that traps dust without scratching surfaces.
Its extendable handle allows easy access to high or hard-to-reach spots like ceilings and gaps.
The round head design covers a wide area efficiently for dust and spider web removal.
Durable and reusable, it provides long-lasting performance for regular home cleaning tasks.
Ideal for versatile use, it simplifies dusting in various household environments.
aiDescription.aiTip: AI-generated content for reference purposes only.

brand.name: gumahus
brand.suggestion: More Hand Tools & Accessories from gumahus

product.desc:
Lightweight and Portable

Its lightweight and portable design makes it easy to handle and maneuver around your home.

Multi-functional Use

Ideal for removing dust and cobwebs from various surfaces, making it a versatile cleaning tool for your home.

Durable Material

Made from durable materials, this dusting brush is built to last, providing long-term value.

Easy to Clean

After use, the tool is easy to clean, ensuring maintenance is hassle-free.

Efficient Dust Collection

The efficient dust collection feature ensures that all dust and debris are gathered, leaving your home cleaner.

3488493062.detail_text: Cast Iron Cleaner with Hanging Ring Cast Iron Scrubber Stainless Steel Pot Pans Cleaning Scrubber for Griddle Skillet Dutch Oven Features: 1.Food-Safe Clean: Crafted from food-grade stainless steel chainmail and silicone, this cast iron cleaner ensures a safe and thorough clean of your grills and cookware without leaving hazardous bristles behind. 2.Stubborn Stain Removal: The unique chainmail design of this chainmail scrubber effortlessly lifts stubborn stains and char from cast iron skillets and pans, restoring your cookware's shine with just a few scrubs. 3.Easy Maintenance: With its chainmail structure that resists food particles and grime, this cast iron skillet cleaner is incredibly easy to clean. Its durable construction prevents bacterial growth, and an integrated hanging loop makes storage simple post-wash. 4.Lasting Durability: Precision-engineered for endurance, this cast iron scrubber can handle hard water and food residues, maintaining its effectiveness over time and keeping your cookware looking new. 5.Cast Iron Care: Cleaning cast iron is a hefty task that can damage the skillet's surface if done improperly. This pot pans cleaning scrubber makes the process a breeze, ensuring you'll never dread cleaning again with this handy tool in your arsenal. product.desc:
Product Description

About this product:

Product Details:

Easy installation in four simple steps

1. Place the steel wool ball on the brush holder

3.Tighten the screws with a screwdriver

2. Align and press to fix the partition

4. Installation and replacement completed

Specification

Material: Stainless steel

Size: Short handle pot brush about 8.5 diameter * 6.5cm height (due to installation problems, the steel ball sometimes presents a tight state, the size will be 1-3cm error)

Features: Decontamination, no harm to hands

Quantity: 1/2/3/5 piece

Product includes: 1/2/3*short handle pot brush or1/3/5* Replacing Bead
product.highlights:
• 【Stainless Steel Construction】: Redefine dishwashing with our Stainless Steel Round Handle Wire Ball Pot and Pan Brush. Crafted entirely from stainless steel, this brush features a durable and rust-resistant construction that ensures long-lasting performance. The fine and dense wire ball effectively removes stubborn stains without shedding or deforming, making dishwashing a breeze.
  • 【Round Handle Design】: The rounded handle provides a comfortable grip, allowing for easy and efficient dishwashing without getting your hands dirty. With its ergonomic design, this brush offers a comfortable and secure grip for extended use.
  • 【Effective Cleaning】: The round shape of the brush head conforms to the inner walls of pots and pans, ensuring thorough cleaning without leaving any dead angles. Its powerful cleaning ability effectively removes grease and grime without damaging the surface of your cookware, keeping your pots and pans looking like new.
  • 【Simple Installation】: Installing our wire ball brush is quick and easy, requiring just four simple steps. Place the wire ball on the brush holder, tighten the screws with a screwdriver, align and press the fixed partition, and you're done. It's that easy to install and replace, ensuring hassle-free use whenever you need it.
  • 【Versatile Usage】: Measuring approximately Diameter 8.5* Height 6.5cmin stainless steel handle length and with a wire ball diameter of about 10cm, our brush is suitable for a variety of kitchen cleaning tasks. Whether you're washing pots, pans, or dishes, this brush is designed to tackle tough stains while keeping your hands safe and comfortable.
product.title: YESPERY Stainless Steel Kitchen Pot Brush with Handle Wire Ball Cleaning Tools Home Kitchen Dish Washing Tools

page_json.category: Tools & Home Improvement > Hand Tools & Accessories
page_json.description: Stainless Steel Construction: Redefine dishwashing with our Stainless Steel Round Handle Wire Ball Pot and Pan Brush. Crafted entirely from stainless steel, this brush features a durable and rust-resistant construction that ensures long-lasting performance. The fine and dense wire ball effectively removes stubborn stains without shedding or deforming, making dishwashing a breeze. Round Handle Design: The rounded handle provides a comfortable grip, allowing for easy and efficient dishwashing without getting your hands dirty. With its ergonomic design, this brush offers a comfortable and secure grip for extended use. Effective Cleaning: The round shape of the brush head conforms to the inner walls of pots and pans, ensuring thorough cleaning without leaving any dead angles. Its powerful cleaning ability effectively removes grease and grime without damaging the surface of your cookware, keeping your pots and pans looking like new.
